_note: Default role/tier map shipped with alloyd. Calibrated 2026-07-17 from published benchmarks (Artificial Analysis, DeepSWE, LiveBench) — full dataset + derivation in docs/calibration/benchmark-data.md. The planner/builder/reviewer roles are ILLUSTRATIVE STARTING EXAMPLES, not a required set — roles are user-defined aliases over (band, effort) points; rename/replace them freely (the config-setup skill personalizes them). Every role's model MUST appear in a band so cross-vendor failover can substitute an equal-caliber tier. Edit freely — nothing here is baked into code. Dispatch templates are user-editable but must keep the {model}, {effort}, and {prompt} placeholders.
